up.method: not quantified in review (only yield g PHB/g CH4)

growth_records.cite: Jiang et al. Carbon Sources for Polyhydroxyalkanoates and an Integrated Biorefinery. International Journal of Molecular Sciences (2016). DOI:10.3390/ijms17071157. [PMC4964529]
growth_records.snippet: Methane | Methylotroph spp. | 1.5 | 51.0 | P3HB | 0.031 | 0.55 [99]... a yield of 0.55 g PHB/g CH4 and a productivity of 0.031 g PHB/L/h were reported using Methylocystis spp.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW secondary value (Table 2 + text, ref [99]). CDW 1.5 g/L, 51% P3HB, 0.031 g/L/h, 0.55 g P3HB/g CH4 (close to theoretical ~54%). Methane uptake rate itself not quantified in review.
